MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-16-2019 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION, 302, PETITIONER JOSE NEVAREZ'S HEARING FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDATE IS OFF CALENDAR. PETITIONER HAS NOT PROPERLY SERVED RESPONDENTS CALIFORNIA UNEMPLOYMENT INSURANCE APPEALS BOARD AND EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT. (SEE CODE CIV. PROC. 1107 [WRIT PETITION SHALL BE SERVED ON PRESIDING OFFICER, SECRETARY, OR A MAJORITY OF THE MEMBERS OF THE BOARD].) THE PETITION ALSO APPEARS TO BE UNTIMELY ON ITS FACE. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR#6185, TONYVAUGHN@YAHOO.COM, NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing For Writ Of Administrative Mandate
Off Calendar Jul-16-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER JOSE NEVAREZ's Hearing For Writ Of Administrative Mandate.

Off calendar. Petitioner has not properly served Respondents California Unemployment Insurance Appeals Board and Employment Development Department. (See Code Civ. Proc. 1107 [writ petition shall be served on presiding officer, secretary, or a majority of the members of the board].) The petition also appears to be untimely on its face.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
